description: When a supplier produces a part for the first time, a quality engineer must perform an FAI to verify that their production process creates a part that conforms to the drawing.

nodes.task_description: Receive the first part produced by the supplier along with their FAI report.

expected_outcome.value: Agent obtains the part and the supplier's documentation.

nodes.task_description: Independently measure every dimension on the part as specified on the engineering drawing.
Compare the measurements to the drawing's requirements and the supplier's FAI report. If everything matches, approve the supplier's process.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms all dimensions are within tolerance and approves the FAI.
